_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Monitoring and evaluation across the product life cycle involves effectively integrating evaluation activities into different stages of the delivery process.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the data product lifecycle, including launch, active management, deprecation, and consumer migration planning.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.487), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.477).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.518). Shared vocabulary: [product]. DDaT-only terms [across, activities, cycle, delivery, different, effectively] vs WIDAI-only terms [active, consumer, data, deprecation, launch, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.887, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DDaT element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Monitoring and evaluation across the product life cycle involves effectively int" and "Manage the data product lifecycle, including launch, active management, deprecat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 ≈ STS 0.518 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [product] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [product]. DDaT-only: [across, activities, cycle, delivery, different, effectively]. WIDAI-only: [active, consumer, data, deprecation, launch, lifecycle].
